title: Anthropic's Brand New AI Just Started the Gold Rush (Fable 5)
summary: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's newly announced Claude Fable 5 model, discussing its capabilities for regulated industries and potential use cases. The video covers context engineering for AI agents and design patterns for long-running applications.
writeup: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's newly announced Claude Fable 5 model, focusing on its capabilities for regulated industries and the use cases it opens up. The discussion centers on context engineering for AI agents and design patterns for long-running applications. Key threads include context management, agent architecture, and how these patterns support applications that run over extended periods.
